name: 7-Minute HIIT
description: The classic scientific 7-minute workout. 12 high-intensity exercises using only body weight and a chair.

name: Core Reset Express
description: Focused core session that alternates holds and dynamic moves to wake up your midline in under 10 minutes.

name: Lower Body Burn
description: Glutes, quads, and hamstrings on repeat with isometric holds and unilateral work for balance.

name: Cardio Power Ladder
description: Fast-paced combo of plyometrics and planks to spike your heart rate with minimal space required.

name: Gentle Yoga Flow
description: A calming sequence of floor poses, hips-openers, and slow breath work to reset between tougher sessions.
